mnemonics: MP3 and Videos are like cats, they need a 'Pet' (Player) to be played
To Speak, you need to 'Read' (Text to Speech)
keyPoints: Intent Filter is like a 'Puzzle' to find the correct Activity to handle the Intent
Activity Life Cycle is like a 'Wheel' that goes through different states (Created, Started, Resumed, Paused, Stopped, Destroyed)
Text to Speech is available in the 'Speech' class (java.lang.text.TextToSpeech)
To play Audio and Video, use the 'MediaPlayer' class (android.media.MediaPlayer)
Audio and Video files can be loaded using the 'InputStream' class (java.io.InputStream)
